channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran Live Updates: Trump Says Agreement with Iran Will Be Signed 'Tomorrow'
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center, DOJ confirms
item.description: A judge had ordered the Trump administration to remove the name by noon Saturday.

item.title: Armed men abduct security expert in gang-ridden Haiti
item.description: James Boyard serves as cabinet director of Haiti's Defense Ministry and inspector general of the police.

item.title: One dead, nine injured in Texas mass shooting; suspect killed
item.description: The suspect, Victor Mata Villarreal, was wanted for attempted murder of a police officer after firing at law enforcement during a vehicle chase.
